response.justification: While Bogdan is an exceptional senior software engineer with 15+ years of experience and strong performance optimization credentials, this role fundamentally requires specialized hardware expertise in system-on-chip design, GPU architecture, and AI accelerator modeling. His background is entirely in software systems (web services, microservices, backend optimization) rather than semiconductor/hardware design. The role's core responsibilities around SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, and hardware-software co-design for accelerators represent a different engineering discipline than his demonstrated expertise.
strengths: 15+ years as Principal/Staff-level engineer with proven system architecture and performance optimization skills
Deep experience optimizing low-latency systems, async I/O, and real-time data processing pipelines relevant to performance bottleneck analysis
Fluent in C/C++ and multiple languages with demonstrated ability to work across diverse technical domains
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, semiconductor design, or hardware modeling—a core required skill
No background in GPU architecture, AI accelerator optimization, or hardware design collaboration
Career entirely in software engineering; lacks the specialized hardware/silicon engineering expertise this role demands

key_factors.factor: SoC/IP modeling expertise required but absent
Software vs. hardware engineering domain mismatch
Strong performance optimization background transfers partially
